selections.name: Codename
selections.reason: Consistent recent form in similar maiden company. Maps perfectly from barrier 3 on this tight track.

selections.name: Renege
selections.reason: Strong runner-up on the synthetic last start. Gets an ideal soft run from gate 2.

selections.name: Defy Gravity
selections.reason: Fitter for recent runs in SA. Lynch stable is highly capable of shipping and winning here.

selections.name: Brazen Martini
selections.reason: Third-up today. Form is mixed but has trialled well enough to warrant inclusion in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Renege
danger_horse.reason: Massive threat if he can replicate his synthetic form on the loam turf base.

selections.name: Blackjack
selections.reason: Fitter second-up. Gets the rails run from barrier 1 which is a massive advantage at Mildura.

selections.name: Bold Jester
selections.reason: Patrick Payne runner showing progressive form. Wide gate is the only major concern.

selections.name: Impending Fury
selections.reason: First-up today. Trialled nicely since stable change and maps well from barrier 3.

selections.name: Fram Strait
selections.reason: Second-up. Fitter for a fair run at Pakenham Synthetic and has scope to improve.

danger_horse.name: Bold Jester
danger_horse.reason: Payne stable is elite at placing these country shippers; watch market closely.

selections.name: Full Display
selections.reason: Placed in all three career starts. Patrick Payne runner who looks clearly superior to this field.

selections.name: Magic Machine
selections.reason: Preusker and Meech combination is always lethal in regional VIC. Expect sharp improvement.

selections.name: Mr Zeus
selections.reason: Drawn the inside alley. Likely to show tactical speed and lead or box-seat.

selections.name: Saraya
selections.reason: Experienced regional mare who can sneak into the minor money in a depleted field.

danger_horse.name: Magic Machine
danger_horse.reason: The main danger if the favorite falters, representing a highly successful local stable.

selections.name: Tanna
selections.reason: Excellent third last start at Murray Bridge. Gets the gun run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Girls Night
selections.reason: Quality mare returning from a spell. Excellent fresh record and maps beautifully.

selections.name: Grande Terre
selections.reason: Class runner of the field but has to carry a heavy weight from a wide draw.

selections.name: Listening Is Doing
selections.reason: Fitter for a solid first-up third at Wangaratta. Handles both wet and dry loam.

danger_horse.name: Girls Night
danger_horse.reason: Boasts a class edge and excellent first-up stats. Will challenge strongly late.

selections.name: Eau De Cologne
selections.reason: In career-best form. Narrowly missed last start after a dominant win. Well drawn.

selections.name: Two Stroke Baby
selections.reason: Highly progressive 3yo filly coming off a strong maiden win at Bendigo.

selections.name: Divine Fire
selections.reason: Experienced campaigner dropping back in class. Brad Rawiller booking is a key pointer.

selections.name: Vivid Blooms
selections.reason: Maps perfectly from barrier 1. Solid fourth last start at Ballarat and handles loam.

danger_horse.name: Two Stroke Baby
danger_horse.reason: Rapidly improving filly who could easily measure up to this BM56 grade.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #3, Exacta Box 3, 9, Trifecta 3 / 9, 10, 14 / ALL

selections.name: Packers Journey
selections.reason: Drawn the inside alley. Consistent synthetic form translates well to this tight track.

selections.name: Mr Markle
selections.reason: Patrick Payne runner with excellent country credentials. Major threat despite the gate.

selections.name: Sweet 'N' Spicy
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 3. Linda Meech takes the ride, making her a solid each-way hope.

selections.name: Owl Witness
selections.reason: Last-start winner, but the wide draw makes it very tough at Mildura.

danger_horse.name: Mr Markle
danger_horse.reason: Class runner who will be launching a powerful finish under Brad Rawiller.

selections.name: Phoebe Buffay
selections.reason: Patrick Payne-trained mare with excellent class. Maps to run a huge race third-up.

selections.name: Pick A Symphony
selections.reason: Last-start Bendigo winner. Must overcome a very wide gate, but has the class.

selections.name: Sacred Fort
selections.reason: Solid third last start. Handles rain-affected or dry loam tracks with ease.

selections.name: Ilovenews
selections.reason: Drawn beautifully in barrier 4. Can peak third-up here at a good price.

danger_horse.name: Pick A Symphony
danger_horse.reason: The clear danger if he can negotiate the wide barrier draw early in the race.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #7, Exacta Box 5, 7. Trifecta 5, 7 / 1, 5, 7, 12 / ALL
